title: To You in 2016
overview: Shizuka lives a painful life until things start to take a sudden turn when she meets an alien named Takopi.

title: Takopi's Salvation
overview: Takopi makes various attempts to help Shizuka, but things don't seem to work in his favor.

title: Takopi's Confession
overview: Takopi realizes something important while covering up the crime with Shizuka and Naoki.

title: Azuma-kun's Salvation
overview: Naoki struggles between his conscience and his desire to help Shizuka.

title: To You in 2022
overview: Shizuka goes to Tokyo, and Takopi remembers something very important that happened in the past.

title: To All of You in 2016
overview: Takopi makes an important decision that will save not only Shizuka but also Marina and Naoki.
